_doc: Per-repo MCP server registration for VS Code Copilot Agent mode. Registers the HAMR MCP adapter (scripts/global/hamr-mcp-adapter.js). Refs #3043; landed dark by #3796 (Epic #3789).
_note: User-level config: ~/.config/Code/User/mcp.json. This file is the per-repo override.
_default_off: DARK: MEGINGJORD_MCP_ADAPTER_ENABLED is unset here, so the adapter is fail-closed (default-OFF) and refuses to serve until an explicit, evidence-gated flip to '1'. See scripts/global/mcp-adapter-gate.js.
